name: Dust of Disappearance
description: This powder resembles fine sand. There is enough of it for one use. When you take a {@action Utilize|XPHB} action to throw the dust into the air, you and each creature and object within a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from you have the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition for {@dice 2d4} minutes. The duration is the same for all subjects, and the dust is consumed when its magic takes effect. Immediately after an affected creature makes an attack ro
